title: Terracotta Dungeons (CTM)
description: Connect all terracotta blocks with a Minecraft Dungeons theme; compatible with any resource pack!
body:
## ⚔️ Connected Terracotta Minecraft Dungeons Style
Stop building with flat, boring blocks. This resource pack overhauls all 17 terracotta types with full CTM (Connected Textures) support, giving your builds seamless transitions and dungeon-inspired depth. This is my very first project—thank you for the support!
## ✨ Key Features:
- **Seamless Textures:** Eliminates repetitive grids for smooth, professional walls and floors.
- **Complete Overhaul:** Supports all 16 colors + natural uncolored terracotta.
- **Minecraft Dungeons Aesthetic:** Features high-quality textures adapted from Vanilla Tweaks, enhanced with custom-made connected logic.
## 🧩 Dependencies
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or **OptiFine** (Forge) required for connected textures to work.
